title: Error Envelope
description: Structured error response from Ontologie CLI, SDK, and API

code.description: Machine-readable error code. New values may be added in minor versions. Clients must not validate this field as a closed enum. See docs/errors.md for the current list of known codes.

retryable.description: Whether the caller can retry this operation

summary.description: Actionable recovery instruction for agents and developers

command.description: Suggested CLI command to resolve the error
